title: OpenDocs
description: OpenDocs is a browser-based document workspace for scanning, organizing, editing, compressing, converting, and merging files. It lets users upload images or PDFs, crop and reorder pages, preview layouts, and export polished PDF documents directly from the browser. The app also includes PDF merging, file compression, image conversion, and temporary Supabase-backed session cleanup for uploaded scan pages, making it useful for quick document preparation without a heavy desktop tool.

title: ScholarSync
description: A comprehensive Student management system with real-time tracking, analytics dashboard, and automated reporting for teams.

title: Client Portfolio Site
description: A custom portfolio website built with Next.js, optimized for SEO and performance, showcasing the client's work with a CMS-driven content flow.

title: Avenue Website
